concept.domains: (topic concept) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c concept oceConcept-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
concept.title: 04 Printhead, matrix plate and residual ink

abstract.p: This document gives practical information regarding the printhead, matrix plate and residual ink.

fig.title: The printhead(s) (marked in yellow) in the printhead carriage

section.title: Printhead position matrix plate

fig.title: Printheads positioned in the matrix plate.

section.p: The 4 printheads are positioned in the matrix plate of the printhead carriage (M3,Y4,K5,C6). Each printhead is positioned correctly in the matrix plate with the help of 2 position balls in the holes of the matrix plate.
Besides the 4 printheads also 2 x 2 dummy printheads are positioned (position 1,2 and 7,8).

section.title: Media touches and ink pollution
section.p: Ink pollution on the matrix plate and re-distributed ink on the bottom of the printheads is the result of media touches.

section.title: Ink droplets on the matrix plate and dummy printheads
section.p: Ink droplets generated by ink drops in the maintenance tray, are visible on the matrix plate and the bottom of the dummy printheads.

b.i: Ink droplets on the matrix plate and dummy printheads

section.p: As the dummy printheads are not cleaned by automatic maintenance, these needs to be cleaned manually using a swab stick.
